npc.talk.usage.en: Who would you like to talk to? Usage: talk <monster_name>

npc.talk.no_room_coords.en: Cannot determine the coordinates of the current room.
npc.talk.no_room_coords.ko: 현재 방의 좌표를 확인할 수 없습니다.

npc.talk.hostile.en: {name} is hostile and cannot be spoken to.

npc.talk.error.en: An error occurred during the conversation.

npc.talk.quest.already_completed.en: 🎉 You already received your basic equipment. Enjoy your adventure!
npc.talk.quest.already_completed.ko: 🎉 이미 기본 장비를 받으셨군요. 모험을 즐기세요!

npc.talk.quest.progress.en: 📋 You have collected {count}/10 Essence of Life. You need {remaining} more.

npc.talk.quest.start.en:
📜 Quest Started: Basic Equipment

🎯 Objective: Collect 10 Essence of Life
📍 Location: Obtainable by defeating monsters in the wilderness

Return to me when completed to receive basic equipment:
• Wooden Club (weapon)
• Linen Shirt (armour)
• Linen Trousers (armour)
npc.talk.quest.start.ko:
📜 퀘스트 시작: 기본 장비

🎯 목표: 생명의 정수 10개 수집
📍 위치: 야생 몬스터 처치 시 획득 가능

완료 후 다시 저에게 오시면 기본 장비를 드리겠습니다:
• 나무 곤봉 (무기)
• 리넨 상의 (방어구)
• 리넨 하의 (방어구)

npc.talk.quest.complete.en:
🎉 Quest Completed: Basic Equipment

✅ Received 10 Essence of Life.
🎁 Basic equipment has been given as reward:
{equipment}

You are now ready to begin your adventure!
npc.talk.quest.complete.ko:
🎉 퀘스트 완료: 기본 장비

✅ 생명의 정수 10개를 받았습니다.
🎁 보상으로 기본 장비를 지급했습니다:
{equipment}

이제 모험을 시작할 준비가 되었습니다!

npc.talk.quest.complete_error.en: ❌ An error occurred whilst completing the quest.
npc.talk.quest.complete_error.ko: ❌ 퀘스트 완료 처리 중 오류가 발생했습니다.

npc.talk.quest.equipment_error.en: An error occurred during equipment delivery

npc.trade.no_room_coords.en: Cannot determine the coordinates of the current room.
npc.trade.no_room_coords.ko: 현재 방의 좌표를 확인할 수 없습니다.

npc.trade.error.en: An error occurred during the trade.

npc.trade.monk.already_completed.en: You have already completed the quest. No more trades available.
npc.trade.monk.already_completed.ko: 이미 퀘스트를 완료하셨습니다. 더 이상 거래할 수 없습니다.

npc.trade.monk.essence_only.en: The monk only accepts Essence of Life.

npc.trade.monk.no_essence.en: You don't have any Essence of Life.

npc.trade.monk.error.en: An error occurred during the trade.

npc.shop.usage.en: Usage: shop list [merchant_name] or shop buy <item> [merchant_name]
npc.shop.usage.ko: 사용법: shop list [상인이름] 또는 shop buy <아이템> [상인이름]

npc.shop.no_room_coords.en: Cannot determine the coordinates of the current room.
npc.shop.no_room_coords.ko: 현재 방의 좌표를 확인할 수 없습니다.

npc.shop.invalid_action.en: Usage: shop list or shop buy <item>
npc.shop.invalid_action.ko: 사용법: shop list 또는 shop buy <아이템>

npc.shop.error.en: An error occurred whilst using the shop.

npc.shop.no_items.en: This merchant has nothing to sell.

npc.shop.quest_required.en: You must complete the quest first to purchase this item.
npc.shop.quest_required.ko: 이 아이템을 구매하려면 먼저 퀘스트를 완료해야 합니다.

npc.shop.buy_error.en: An error occurred during the purchase.
